data.content:
Retrieval-Augmented Generation
Retrieval-Augmented Generation is the underlying methodology used by the LightRAG system.

LightRAG
LightRAG is a lightweight Retrieval-Augmented Generation system supporting graph-based knowledge storage and efficient document retrieval.

Knowledge Graph
Knowledge Graph is a structure used for storage and construction from unstructured text within LightRAG.

LLM
LLM refers to Large Language Model providers supported by the system.

Entity Extraction
Entity Extraction is an automatic process part of the document indexing feature.

Embedding
Embedding refers to embedding providers and models configured for the document processing pipeline.

Query Modes
Query Modes include naive, local, global, hybrid, and mix options available in LightRAG.

Document Indexing
Document Indexing is a fast process with automatic entity extraction supported by LightRAG.

Reranking
Reranking is a built-in method for improved retrieval quality within LightRAG.

Document Processing Pipeline
Document Processing Pipeline is the system component verified by the test document to work with embedding and LLM models.

Semantic Search
Semantic Search is enabled over indexed content by the system after building a knowledge graph.

LightRAG Test Document
LightRAG Test Document is a small test document used to verify the document processing pipeline.

Unstructured Text
Unstructured text serves as the source material for knowledge graph construction within the system.

Document Retrieval
Document retrieval is an efficient process supported by the LightRAG system.

Documents
Documents are the general source files from which the system extracts entities and relationships.

Indexed Content
Indexed content refers to the processed data over which semantic search is enabled.
